Interface TrimMaterial

All Superinterfaces:
Keyed, RegistryAware, Translatable
public interface TrimMaterial extends Keyed, Translatable, RegistryAware
Represents a material that may be used in an ArmorTrim.

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
